children.heading: Public members; appointment of women and minority groups
children.label: b Public members; appointment of women and minority groups
children.text: All selection boards established under this section shall include public members. The Secretary shall assure that a substantial number of women and members of minority groups are appointed to each selection board established under this section.

children.heading: Disqualification for service on foreign service selection boards
children.label: c Disqualification for service on foreign service selection boards
children.text: No public members appointed pursuant to this section may be, at the time of their appointment or during their appointment, an agent of a foreign principal (as defined by ) or a lobbyist for a foreign entity (as defined in ) or receive income from a government of a foreign country.section 611(b) of this titlesection 1602(6) of title 2
